# Crystal Hollow

## Theme

A forgotten crystal cavern where magical crystals have animated the surrounding creatures.

## Biome Gameplay

Crystal Hollow teaches:

- projectile avoidance
- area denial
- positioning
- target priority

Unlike previous biomes, many enemies attack from range or create dangerous crystal zones.

Rule:
Every enemy focuses on crystal magic or crystal growth.

---

# Crystal Beetle

## Role

Swarm Melee

## Difficulty

Easy

## Description

Small crystal insects.

Weak individually.

Dangerous in large groups.

## AI

- Rushes toward player.
- Always attacks closest target.
- Tries to surround player.

## Basic Attack

Crystal Bite

Quick melee attack.

## Ability

Crystal Explosion

Upon death explodes into crystal shards.

Effects

- small AoE damage
- leaves crystal fragments for 3 seconds

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- crystal shards
- purple particles

## SFX

- crystal crack
- insect screech
- shard explosion

---

# Crystal Golem

## Role

Heavy Bruiser

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Living crystal construct.

Extremely durable.

## AI

- Slowly approaches player.
- Uses Crystal Slam whenever close.

## Basic Attack

Heavy Crystal Punch

## Ability

Crystal Slam

Slams both fists into the ground.

Effects

- medium AoE damage
- crystal spikes emerge in front

Cooldown

8 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Punch
- Ground Slam
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- crystal spikes
- crystal dust
- ground crack

## SFX

- heavy impact
- crystal breaking

---

# Crystal Bat

## Role

Flying Harasser

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Flying crystal predator.

Fast but fragile.

## AI

- Constantly circles player.
- Attacks from range.
- Never lands.

## Basic Attack

Crystal Shot

Small crystal projectile.

## Ability

Crystal Dive

Quick dive attack.

After diving immediately returns to the air.

Cooldown

6 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle Fly
- Fly
- Attack
- Dive
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- crystal projectile
- purple trail

## SFX

- wing flap
- crystal shot
- screech

---

# Crystal Guardian

## Role

Biome Boss

## Difficulty

Boss

## Description

Ancient guardian protecting the crystal core.

## AI

- Controls battlefield.
- Creates crystal hazards.
- Uses ranged and melee attacks.

## Basic Attack

Crystal Staff Strike

Heavy melee attack.

## Ability 1

Crystal Barrage

Launches several crystal projectiles.

Player must dodge.

## Ability 2

Crystal Growth

Large crystals emerge from the ground.

Effects

- block movement
- deal damage when appearing

## Ability 3

Crystal Storm

Creates rotating crystal shards around himself.

Dangerous at close range.

## Phase 2

Triggered at 50% HP.

Changes

- Crystal Barrage fires more projectiles.
- Crystal Growth creates more obstacles.

## Phase 3

Triggered at 25% HP.

Guardian overloads the crystal core.

Effects

- Crystal Storm duration increased
- attacks faster
- projectiles move faster

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Heavy Attack
- Cast
- Ground Slam
- Roar
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- crystal barrage
- crystal spikes
- crystal storm
- crystal glow
- purple energy

## SFX

- crystal resonance
- crystal shatter
- magic hum
- heavy impact
